ab: pasuya, uk’a na viiciu, teko n’a uh ne’e ho mhino.
ch: W:pasuya，家裡沒有酒了，你去買米酒。
en: pasuya, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: ’a panto mo n’a cono pania ne suiziva, ’ancu te ’ahʉyʉ mhino!
ch: M:廚房裡還有一瓶，不用買吧!
en: There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

ab: moc’o cono pania, o’a te amso, ivaho n’a mhino no te yuso no pania.
ch: W:一瓶不夠，再去買兩瓶回來。
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: te’o mhino no viiciu, pano n’a?
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

ab: ’a panto, te po apio?
en: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: poa yuso no pania, hon’a cono cfua ci fʉesʉ.
ch: m:我要買兩瓶，還要買一包米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: eni ’e fʉesʉ, pano teko n’a?
ch: w:米在這裡，你還需要什麼嗎?
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?

ab: te’o n’a maezo mhia fcuyu, pano?
en: I want some eggs too, do you have some?

ab: imza cu’so psʉcʉcʉhneni.
en: We are out of eggs.

ab: te’o mhino no ’i’ihosa.
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: no mo mainennu ci ’I’ihosa?
en: What kind of clothes do you like?

ab: te’o mhino to mo nanʉhtʉ ’o suyusi.
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: te ʉmnʉ ’e mo fʉhngoya?
en: How about this red one?

ab: pano n’a mocmosi?
en: Do you have another color?

ab: pato mo fʉecʉ’za ho enghova.
en: We have white and green ones too.

ab: poa coni to mo enghova.
ch: m:請給我一件綠色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in green.

ab: pasuya, mimu uh nenu ne soni? Peohpeayofʉ?
ch: W:pasuya你剛剛去哪裡了?你去運動嗎?
en: pasuya, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: o’a, os’o to’usni ’o ba’i’u ho phieni ’o lasi emʉ’a ci macucuma.
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: ’ia mamo maica. pano teko hioa ho yofna? uh tan’e teto eaabobonʉ.
ch: W:這樣啊。你晚上有沒有空?要不要和我一起吃飯。
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: o’a te’o’so meelʉ. te’o’so mhia ’i’ihosa.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: te’o to’ofeihni.
en: Then, I will go with you.

ab: yokeoasu, te pio na huphina ta chae?
ch: m:你好，請問這把菜多少錢?
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?

ab: te 20 ’e mo cono efʉta.
en: The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.

ab: te pio na huphina ta f’ue?
en: How much are these sweet potatoes?

ab: te 30 ’e hiasi ecvʉhʉ.
en: Thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: te’o yuso no efʉta ci chae ho kinkini si f’ue poa auseoseolʉ 30 na huphinasi.
ch: m:請給我兩把菜和30元的地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and thirty dollars of sweet potatoes.
